arsenal.title: World Cup Icon
arsenal.fact: Scored in the 2018 World Cup Final as a teenager and hit a historic hat-trick in the 2022 World Cup Final, winning the Golden Boot with 8 goals.

arsenal.title: Elite Versatility
arsenal.fact: Equally lethal as a left-winger, right-winger, or central striker, combining playmaking speed with clinical finishing.

arsenal.title: Champions League Producer
arsenal.fact: Scored 48+ Champions League goals before turning 25, setting records for the youngest player to reach several UCL goal milestones.

arsenal.title: Dribbling & Ball Carry
arsenal.fact: Averages over 3.5 successful take-ons per 90, making him a dynamic threat in transition and 1v1 situations.

counterattacks.claim: Mbappé won the World Cup with a star-studded France team. Haaland plays for Norway, a small footballing nation, so international comparisons are unfair.
counterattacks.defenseUpgrade: Point out that Mbappé did not just win; he carried France in 2022, scoring a hat-trick in the final and showing elite leadership when the pressure was highest.

counterattacks.claim: Versatility is fine, but Haaland is the ultimate specialist striker. Haaland won the Treble and broke the Premier League scoring record in his debut season in a far tougher league than Ligue 1.
counterattacks.defenseUpgrade: Argue that Mbappé's ability to create goals (150+ career assists) makes him a much more complete and influential football player than a pure box-finisher.

counterattacks.claim: Speed fades with age. Haaland's physical size, strength, and box positioning make his goalscoring style more sustainable long-term.
counterattacks.defenseUpgrade: Emphasize that Mbappé's game is built on high football IQ, quick decision-making, and close control, not just raw pace.

strengths: Excellent points about Mbappé's legacy in World Cups and his triple-goal final performance.
Strong use of assist data to highlight his superiority as a complete forward.
weaknesses: Allowed the 'Ligue 1 tax' argument to go undefended.
Failed to mention his recent move to Real Madrid to capture Champions League dominance.
missedOpportunities: Could have highlighted his goalscoring record in away UCL knockout fixtures (e.g., at Camp Nou, Allianz Arena).
Did not compare his dribbling metrics to Haaland's minimal ball involvement.
coachFeedback.upgradeSuggestion: Acknowledge Haaland's goal-scoring volume but frame Mbappé as a 'catalyst player' who can decide games single-handedly through individual brilliance and elite creation.

round1.comment: Exciting argument, but vulnerable to the Premier League dominance and Treble points from Team Haaland.

round2.comment: Superb correction. Highlighting creation metrics and clutch European goals makes a devastating case for the complete player.
